home.subtitleLine1: Compose a score inspired by our Spring–Summer 2026 campaign with Max Richter.
home.subtitleLine2: Your composition will be printed for collection in store.

compose.title: Compose Your Score
compose.intro: Use the {seconds} seconds to create and refine your composition.

identification.title: YOUR DETAILS
identification.intro: To receive your composition as a printed music sheet from us at Maison Margiela, please provide your details.
identification.validationDateOfBirthFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future
identification.validationEmail: Please fill in a valid email.

review.title: YOUR COMPOSITION
review.description:
Please note this audio will not be saved.
Press "Continue" to receive your score in music sheet form, available for pickup in-store.

resultId.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

TO PICK UP
resultId.presentDescription: Present this QR code to our staff at the Maison Margiela Store on Level 2
resultId.storeAddress: Shop 2081, Podium Level Two, ifc mall

kiosk.scanInstruction: Scan the QR code to print your score.
kiosk.errorEnterCode: Please enter or scan a code

scan.qrInvalid: This QR code may be invalid or expired.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.section1Body: By accessing and using this service, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
terms.section2Body: This service allows you to compose a musical narrative. You agree to use it only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
terms.section3Body: All content, branding, and materials are the property of Maison Margiela or its licensors. Your composition is your own creative work.
terms.section4Body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Maison Margiela shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this service.
terms.section5Body: For questions regarding these terms, please contact Maison Margiela through official channels.

privacy.title: PRIVACY PREFERENCES
privacy.marketingIntro: Having read the information notice, I authorize Margiela S.a.s.u. to the processing of my personal data for Marketing* purposes as described in paragraph 3.1.a) of the information notice. You can at any time withdraw, free of charge, your consent to receive the above-mentioned communications by clicking on the appropriate option in each email received, as well as by writing to the address privacy@margiela.com or otherwise contacting Margiela S.a.s.u. at the addresses indicated at paragraph 1 of the information notice.
privacy.profilingIntro: Having read the information notice, I authorize the Joint Controllers OTB S.p.A. and Margiela S.a.s.u. to process my personal data for the purpose of Customer analysis to provide experiences in line with your preferences* as described in paragraph 3.2.a) of the information notice. You can at any time withdraw, free of charge, your consent to be subject to profiling by writing to the address privacy@margiela.com, privacy@otb.net or otherwise contacting the Joint Controller at the addresses indicated at paragraph 1 of the information notice.
privacy.validationConsent: Please select an option for both marketing and profiling.
privacy.acceptPrivacyTerms: Please accept the Privacy Terms to receive your score.
privacy.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

metadata.title: Maison Margiela | Compose Your Narrative
metadata.description: Drape your memory, sculpt your narrative. Compose your unique soundscape.
